source_request.historical_image_policy: Do not use historical v03/v04 faction flag sheets. Use only the user's new Zhaoming reference image and the written art direction below.
source_request.current_image_policy: Active references use stable unversioned PNG paths under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/. Before accepting a regenerated image, archive the previous current PNG under project/severed-homeland/assets/style/faction-emblems/history/ with the next _vNN filename, then overwrite the stable current path.
source_request.reuse_policy: Reuse the existing Suming State / Qingming Court emblem from v01; do not regenerate it.
source_request.delivery_rule: Each faction emblem remains one standalone current image with a stable unversioned output path.

reference_images.role: Zhaoming style and composition reference only
reference_images.use: Study the high-civilization feel, nautical compass structure, golden solar rays, red imperial textile mood, and moon-white ring. Do not copy exact pixels or add flag fabric unless the emblem itself needs a simple backdrop.

shared_generation_rules.format: single square emblem image, centered composition, large readable silhouette, clean neutral background or minimal textile/backdrop only when specified
shared_generation_rules.style: high-end fantasy production concept art, heraldic asset reference, practical for later in-game emblem and ComfyUI production
must_have: one standalone emblem, not a sheet
no text, no captions, no letters, no watermark
no UI mockup or presentation board
shared_generation_rules.negative_prompt: text, caption, letters, watermark, UI labels, multi-panel sheet, repeated logos, modern sports logo, modern national flag, character face, busy scenic background, tiny unreadable symbol

prompts.design_lock: The emblem must feel like an advanced imperial maritime civilization: high-status, precise, astronomical, and nautical. The previous v01 red disk direction is rejected.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one standalone square faction emblem for the Zhaoming Empire. Use the provided reference image only for direction: advanced civilization, gold sunburst, refined maritime compass, circular astrolabe structure, red imperial textile mood, and a moon-white ring. The new emblem should be a high-end sun-and-moon nautical seal: an antique golden solar compass or imperial astrolabe at the center, long elegant flame-like sun rays around the rim, a moon-white crescent/ring integrated into the navigation dial, subtle star-map or compass-rose markings, and a sense of oceanic navigation without drawing ships or waves as literal decoration. Material language: aged gold, deep vermilion enamel or lacquer, moon-white ceramic/ivory inlay, dark red worn banner backdrop if needed. Mood: powerful sea empire, advanced astronomy, old imperial craft, expensive but ancient. Centered, crisp, readable at distance. No text, no letters, no multi-panel sheet, no modern logo, no character, no copied flag sheet.
prompts.negative_prompt: simple flat red disk, crude sun icon, cartoon logo, modern tech UI, spaceship, literal sailing ship, readable text, Chinese characters, watermark, multiple flags, character portrait, copied screenshot, giant decorative background

prompts.design_lock: No metal material and no advanced technology tree. The Wanshou emblem must be built from bone, wood, antler, tooth, hide cord, carved pigments, ash, and natural wear.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one standalone square faction emblem for the Northern Beastfolk Tribal Alliance, the Wanshou banner mark. It must represent many beast clans united, not one animal mascot. Build the emblem as a handmade tribal totem seal made only from carved bone, antler, tooth, old wood, bark, rawhide cord, sinew knots, ash-black burn marks, ochre pigment, bone-white scratches, and weathered northern wood grain. Arrange interlocked beast-clan signs around a central spirit flame or oath knot: wolf-ear cuts, bear claw notches, elk antler branches, ram horn curves carved from bone, raven feather silhouettes cut from wood, boar tusk crescents, and bead knots. The silhouette should feel rough, sacred, portable, and low-tech: something tied to shields, drums, and hide banners by northern tribes. No metal, no gold, no iron, no polished brass, no gemstone, no machinery, no mechanical symmetry, no modern logo. Centered, readable, clean square emblem, neutral dark natural background.
prompts.negative_prompt: metal, gold, silver, iron, bronze, polished brass, steel, gemstone, machinery, advanced technology, mechanical parts, sci-fi, modern sports logo, single wolf head only, single lion mascot, chessboard, game pieces, text, Chinese characters, flag sheet, multi-panel board, cute animal, cluttered scenic background
